case_title: ELVIRA ZAYAS VS. JORGE LUIS GARCIA LINARES

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZAYAS, ELVIRA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-12-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-12-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---GABRIEL CURZ. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---PAU FIOL.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAYAS, ELVIRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LINARES, JORGE LUIS GARCIA DBA LA GUALUPANA JOYERIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
